use_cases: Display client or partner logos to build trust
Showcase brand collaborations on a company website
Create a 'trusted by' section for marketing pages
Feature investor or supporter logos in a showcase
Build social proof sections for landing pages
ai_summary: A minimalist logo grid component from the shadcnblockscom collection, designed to showcase client, partner, or supporter logos in a clean horizontal or grid layout. Commonly used for trust signals on landing pages, this flat-design component requires no complex interactions and renders responsively across desktop and mobile platforms.
